overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt walking along a scenic coastal cliff path during golden hour. The journey progresses from open grassy hillsides with grazing goats to a cobblestone path leading into a fortified settlement, with expansive ocean views and distant mountains visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside walking path with stone wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the cliff path with swords on his back, moving away from the camera

notable_agents.action: goats grazing on the grassy hillside to the right of the path

entered.detail: low stone wall running parallel to the left side of the dirt path
large mountain rising from the water in the distance, partially shrouded in mist
calm sea stretching to the horizon with warm golden sun reflection
steep rocky cliffside forming the left boundary of the path
wooden fence posts visible further along the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a coastal cliff path bordered by a stone wall on the left and expansive ocean views on the right. The golden hour lighting casts warm tones across the grassy hillsides where goats graze peacefully. A distant mountain island dominates the horizon ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy hillside with scattered trees and grazing animals

events.description: stone wall ends and path opens to wider hillside with more goats visible grazing
path curves right following the coastline, shifting the mountain view to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path through grassy terrain, passing close to grazing animals on the hillside

notable_agents.action: herd of goats grazing and moving along the grassy slope beside the path

entered.detail: leafless dead tree standing prominently on the hillside near the path
small coniferous tree on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The stone wall gives way to open grassy hillsides as the path curves along the coastline. Goats graze prominently on the right slope near a distinctive dead tree. The distant mountain shifts to the left of the frame as the camera follows the curving path, with rocky outcrops visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified settlement approach with cobblestone paths

events.description: ground surface transitions from dirt trail to cobblestone entering fortified area

agents.ego_description: Geralt approaching and entering a fortified settlement, walking uphill on cobblestone path

entered.detail: weathered cobblestone road replacing the dirt trail, leading into the settlement
wooden palisades and defensive walls marking the settlement entrance
wooden defensive structures and barriers on the right side of the path
stone wall with wooden railings along the left side of the cobblestone path

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to cobblestone as Geralt enters a fortified settlement area. Wooden palisades and defensive structures line both sides of the ascending path. The coastal water remains visible to the right while the terrain becomes more structured with stone and wood architecture replacing the open natural landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal cliffside that gradually transitions from an open natural landscape into a fortified settlement. It begins with Geralt walking beside a stone wall under warm golden hour light, with grazing goats on the grassy hills and a distant mountain island on the horizon. As the path curves along the coastline, the stone wall disappears and the camera passes a distinctive dead tree and rocky outcrops while the distant mountain shifts toward the left of the frame. The scene then shifts as the natural terrain gives way to a cobblestone path, leading the camera upward through wooden palisades and defensive structures. Finally, the open hills are replaced by the structured stone and wood architecture of the settlement, though the coastal waters remain visible to the right.
